name: ferris-search
description: A blazing-fast MCP server for multi-engine web search, written in Rust. Supports 9 search engines and 7 MCP tools with no runtime dependencies.

plugins.name: ferris-search
plugins.description: Multi-engine web search MCP server. Search across Bing, DuckDuckGo, Brave, Baidu, CSDN, Juejin, Exa, Zhihu, and LinuxDo simultaneously. Includes article fetchers for GitHub, CSDN, Juejin, Zhihu, and LinuxDo.
